name: (END) Made in Hell
short_description: Distribution ended on February 6, 2024. Thank you for what you have done.
detailed_description:
Distribution ended on February 6, 2024.
Thank you for what you have done.

Distribution of the platforms (BOOTH, itch.io) that were distributing the same title has also been discontinued.
The same title uploaded to platforms other than those listed above is not under the management of this management.
Please do not download it.
The management will not be held responsible for any problems that may occur when downloading.
In addition, we do not allow live streaming of works downloaded on platforms other than those listed above on YouTube, etc.

Thank you.
